LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT CONTINUES HEARING ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARIO R. LOPEZ TO APRIL 25, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. MR. LOPEZ IS TO FILE AN ACCURATE STATEMENT OF EXPENSES/INCOME. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE HEARING ON THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 12, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. ON MARCH 25, 2014, THIS MATTER WAS CONTINUED TO APRIL 25, 2014. HOWEVER, THE COURT INADVERTENTLY DID NOT SERVE THE ORDER ON THE PARTIES. NO PARTIES WERE PRESENT AT THE HEARING (ON APR-25-2014). ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARIO LOPEZ' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. THE SHERIFF SHALL RETURN THE LEVIED FUNDS OF $ 5,001.68 TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR/CLAIMANT MARIO R. LOPEZ. MR. LOPEZ HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT THE FUNDS ARE NECESSARY FOR HIS SUPPORT AND HIS FAMILY'S SUPPORT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SANDY CARRANZA #7062. (302)

calendar.matters:
Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Judgment Debtor Mario Lopez' Claim Of Exemption is granted. The Sheriff shall return the levied funds of $ 5,001.68 to judgment debtor/claimant Mario R. Lopez. Mr. Lopez has demonstrated that the funds are necessary for his support and his family's support. Order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sandy Carranza #7062.

Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-25-2014 Continued To May-12-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No apperance.

RULING: On March 25, 2014, this matter was continued to April 25, 2014. However, the Court inadvertently did not serve the order on the parties. No parties were present at the hearing. The HEARING ON THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to May 12, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Continued To Apr-25-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mario Lopez, Defendant/Judgment Debtor in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: Matter discussed. The Court continues hearing on Judgment Debtor Mario R. Lopez to April 25, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Mr. Lopez is to file an accurate statement of expenses/income. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
